truthful_notice: This tree contains verified repository writes from the truth-layer bootstrap. The scheduled validator is installed, but no workflow-run result has yet been ingested automatically into this telemetry record.

nodes.title: Phase 1 truth-layer bootstrap
nodes.current_step: Three foundational controls completed in parallel; convergence validation awaits observed workflow execution.

nodes.title: Define objective contracts
nodes.result: Objective schema now requires the requested capability, user-visible outcome, live runtime evidence, disallowed substitutes, and fail-closed completion policy. Commit 681828fe84e10e25bcaf7730d5c9dcd47211db2b.

nodes.title: Separate implementation and operational status
nodes.result: Repository status schema prevents completion unless implementation is installed, operation is verified, and evidence is fresh. Commit 0cf7addb181d5f0e6b41f0350e9618c913ee3edd.

nodes.title: Install fail-closed successor freeze
nodes.result: Successor selection defaults to DENY unless operational verification, fresh evidence, zero critical blockers, and no manual completion dependency are proven. Commit a95b6541b83da1809da62c8d562c986af9e7c371.

nodes.title: Converge and validate truth-layer controls
nodes.current_step: Dependency-free validator and hourly GitHub Actions workflow are installed. Awaiting an observed run result before this convergence gate can pass.

nodes.title: Enumerate accessible organizations and repositories
nodes.current_step: Will begin only after the truth-layer convergence validator produces verified PASS evidence.

semantics.split: One completed or active node may feed multiple concurrent child nodes.
semantics.converge: A node with multiple dependencies cannot begin until its required parent branches satisfy their declared gates.
semantics.resplit: A convergence node may generate new child branches after its own gate passes.
semantics.history_order: Completed task groups are prepended newest-first and never removed merely because later work begins.

corrective_actions.reason: The tree currently records verified repository writes, but workflow results are not yet automatically ingested.

completed_history.title: First parallel truth-layer controls
completed_history.result: Objective contracts, dual implementation/operational status, and fail-closed successor eligibility were installed as three parallel branches.
